name: sink
content: in the depths of a sulk, the-
strange, burning, bulk in my throat,
in the troves, of a half-sunken boat,
in the hinges of a door that just won't stay-
afloat, a store whose racks won't end, and-
a man, who will never pretend:
a letter, written a thousand times over, but-
never gets better; three words, eight-
in the corners of my eyes, in-
the storm, torrential rain, in your goodbyes,
it's pain, painful lies, like the-
time that flies when you're with me,
the peaks, the highs that they don't see,
the wails, the cries that you've never heard.
in the fields of your sun, from-
